creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
On 08/02/2011 14:00, Alain AUDEBERT aka 2A wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR www/159379; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Alain AUDEBERT aka 2A <deuza@fr.freebsd.org>
> To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org,
>  freebsd-www@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: www/159379: Wrong links in french index
> Date: Tue, 2 Aug 2011 13:23:40 +0200
> 
>  I can't test docs-all actually to say if CVS repository is in the same case

Looks like a problem in www/fr/share/sgml/header.l10n.ent.  Using &base;
where it should use &enbase;.


jkois


-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
